title: Paranoia
tagline: Who said your name… and why?

questions.text: Who would make the best parent?
Who has the worst taste in music?
Who would you go on a road trip with?
Who has the most embarrassing crush?
Who would crack first in prison?
Who would make the worst ex?
Who has the most striking glow-up?
Who would survive a zombie apocalypse?
Who has the most skeletons in the closet?
Who would make the best reality TV star?
Who would be the worst roommate?
Who would send the most messages after a breakup?
Who is the most dramatic over nothing?
Who would be the most corruptible?
